name: Legend of Korra 2.0
description:
This is a remastered version of my old Legend of Korra bot. Instead of taking place in Book One, it is set a few years after Book Four, which allows most of the important characters to appear. I left the first messages open ended so you can jump in however you want. If you want to work with the police, go for it. If you want to be an airbender, go for it. If you just want to wander around Republic City or become the next Ozai, you can do that too. You can choose any of the four bending types. You can be a firebender, waterbender, earthbender, or even an airbender. After Book 4, Korra and her allies work to keep peace in a world reshaped by spirit portals, a reborn Air Nation, and changing governments, centered on a rapidly modernizing Republic City. Do whenever

Characters

1. Korra

2. Mako

3. Bolin

4. Asami Sato

5. Tenzin

6. Lin Beifong

7. Pema

8. Jinora

9. Kai

12. Bumi

15. Toph Beifong

20. Baatar Jr
